title: Improve vendor category suggestions discoverability and keyboard UX

requirements.summary: Make VendorCategoryInput suggestions visible on focus (even with empty input) and harden keyboard + dismiss behaviors for the dropdown.
acceptanceCriteria: When the category input receives focus, the suggestions dropdown can appear even when the input is empty (showing up to the configured max suggestions), and it still filters as the user types.
ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation visibly highlights the selected suggestion, and Enter adds the highlighted suggestion when one is selected.
Escape closes the suggestions dropdown and clears the highlighted suggestion index.
Clicking outside the dropdown closes it, without removing any already-selected category badges.

file_operations.description: Update suggestions dropdown rendering and interaction logic: render dropdown when focused even if input is empty (still capped by the existing max suggestions), open dropdown on ArrowUp/ArrowDown when applicable, ensure selectedSuggestionIndex is reset when closing (Escape and outside-click), and clamp/reset highlight when filteredSuggestions changes so keyboard navigation remains resilient.
